description_long: This object is a rectangular storage chest with a domed, hinged lid, constructed primarily from wood panels framed and reinforced with black metal bands. The wood has a polished, slightly glossy finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a classic, sturdy appearance. The front features a prominent black metal latch for securing the lid, while the back displays two visible hinges. The sides are flat and bordered by the same black metal, with no visible handles or additional features. The overall design is reminiscent of a traditional treasure chest, suitable for storing valuables or tools. Its robust build and secure closure make it ideal for use in urban garages, workshops, or storage rooms.
description: A wooden storage chest with a domed, hinged lid, black metal reinforcements, and a front latch. The chest has a polished wood finish and a classic, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed lid, black metal frame, and a central latch for securing the chest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched lid profile and the solid, metal-reinforced wooden side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the domed lid, black metal frame, and two visible hinges for the lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the arched lid and plain, reinforced side panel.
